series_metadata.series_description: Ohio accepts passage of the dietitian registration examination administered by the Commission on Dietetic Registration as meeting the requirements for licensure pursuant to Chapter 4759 ORC. A list of currently registered dietitians is provided twice a y

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in Board office for a period of 2 fiscal years, then destroy provided audit is complete and audit report is released. (Audit means audited by the Auditor of the State and the audit report is released)., Paper: Wastepaper
